name: Imperial Princess Quinquery
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>召</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>煌</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>クインクエリ
desc:
2 Level 5 monsters
You can detach 1 material from this card, then target 1 Level 5 monster in either GY; Special Summon it to either field. If a face-up Level 5 monster you control is destroyed by battle, or leaves the field by an opponent's card effect, while you control this monster: You can add to your hand or Special Summon, 1 Level 5 monster from your Deck. You can only use each effect of "Imperial Princess Quinquery" once per turn.

action: Activates if other cards leave the field
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard
Special Summons from your Graveyard to your opponent's field
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your opponent's field
